product.name: ArNeo Super Eco +R50
product.familyDescriptorPl: Fluorescencyjne dzianiny hi-vis na odzież ostrzegawczą
product.familyDescriptorEn: Fluorescent hi-vis knits for safety wear
product.categorySourceGroup: High Visible Warp Knit Fabrics for Safety Jackets
product.titleDescriptor: Economical Safety Jacket Fabric Laminated with Brillant Strips
product.specLine: 75 g/m², 100% Polyester, Brillant Strips Laminated, High Visible Knit Fabric
descriptions: ArNeo Super Eco +R50 100% polyester, 70-80 g/m² warp knitted neon colored jacket fabric.
It is suitable for digital printing, thus it is possible to make company's logo printed jackets by sublimation printing.
Designed for construction and mining workers.
The edge of the fabric is laminated with 5 cm brillant strips.
Economical Safety Jacket Fabric Laminated with Brillant Strips
75 g/m², 100% Polyester, Brillant Strips Laminated, High Visible Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicitly categorized and marketed as a high-visibility fluorescent safety jacket fabric with laminated brilliant strips for construction and mining workers, directly matching hi-vis safety wear taxonomy.

evidence: High Visible Warp Knit Fabrics for Safety Jackets

applicationImageLabels: Economical High Visible Yellow/Orange Safety Jacket
primary.rationale: Explicitly categorized and marketed as a fluorescent high-visibility safety jacket fabric with laminated brilliant strips, targeting construction and mining workers, directly matching hi-vis apparel.

secondary.rationale: No independent secondary application is stated; the product is solely positioned as a hi-vis safety jacket fabric without explicit references to a distinct sector such as workwear-industrial or another application.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Product is a narrower named sector (hi-vis certified safety jacket fabric) rather than generic industrial workwear.
Digital printing capability is mentioned only for branding logos, not for signage or advertising products.
